governance_comment: Critical-modules list is GOVERNED in docs/03-testing-strategy.md §11 — adding a module is an ADR, removing requires a retrospective.
break_comment: worker.ts drives the deterministic retry/backoff + delivery state machine — the logic mutation testing defends. The fan-out consumer + NATS wiring are covered only by Testcontainers specs (excluded from the fast Stryker suite), so those mutants are NoCoverage here.
